attributes.action: use money to bring more shops and a more welcoming environment to st austell
attributes.additional_details: as living is in st Austell currently is not suitable and has many downsides, its very expensive to live here when we get paid so little and jobs are so hard to find. the public transport is atrocious and its clear there are more homeless and struggling people recently than there has ever been. we need your help.
attributes.background: provide sufficient funds to st austell council to make ig look nice, have good shops, remove the eye-sore structure in town. provide help for the poorer and help make jobs more available, make more frequent public transport and cheaper for the youth
